message:
test(fuzz): add QuarantineStore eviction priority + TTL parity fuzz target (resolves wf64y)

QuarantineStore (quarantine.rs:144-498) implements bounded admission
for untrusted objects. Two non-trivial invariants:
- EvictionEntry::cmp orders by oldest-first → lowest-reputation →
  largest-size; quota-forced eviction MUST evict the worst entry first
- get_fresh and evict_expired use the same staleness rule (closed by
  bead dzhhq); a regression where one path uses `>=` and the other `>`
  lets stale admission state leak between sweep cycles

Existing fcp-store fuzz coverage does not touch QuarantineStore.

Six properties:
- quarantine then contains true; idempotent re-quarantine succeeds
  without inflating used_bytes
- remove inverse: second remove returns NotFound
- get_fresh / evict_expired parity per the dzhhq invariant
- eviction ordering: oldest received_at evicts first
- quota cap enforcement: zone_stats.used_bytes never exceeds policy cap

Once-gated regression anchors:
- (a) get_fresh boundary is `>`: at received_at+ttl still fresh, at
  received_at+ttl+1 stale (dzhhq parity guard)
- (b) 3 entries received_at=10/20/30 + 4th forces oldest evict first
- (c) idempotent quarantine: used_bytes equal before/after second
  quarantine of same id

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -561,5 +561,12 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_store_quarantine"
+path = "fuzz_targets/store_quarantine.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [workspace]
 members = ["."]
